channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Pudgy Penguins launches its 'Club Penguin' moment, and the game doesn't feel like crypto at all

item.title: Preparing for the Quantum Era: Post-Quantum Cryptography Webinar for Security Leaders
item.description: Most organizations assume encrypted data is safe. But many attackers are already preparing for a future where today’s encryption can be broken. Instead of trying to decrypt information now, they are c...

item.title: Cisco Confirms Active Exploitation of Two Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Vulnerabilities
item.description: Cisco has disclosed that two more vulnerabilities affecting Catalyst SD-WAN Manager (formerly SD-WAN vManage) have come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerabilities in question are liste...

item.title: SEC proposes ‘token taxonomy’ for interpreting crypto under securities laws
item.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission has proposed an interpretive framework for applying federal securities laws to digital assets that would carry more weight than staff-level guidance....

item.title: Where Multi-Factor Authentication Stops and Credential Abuse Starts
item.description: Organizations typically roll out multi-factor authentication (MFA) and assume stolen passwords are no longer enough to access systems. In Windows environments, that assumption is often wrong. Attacker...

item.title: Europol-Led Operation Takes Down Tycoon 2FA Phishing-as-a-Service Linked to 64,000 Attacks
item.description: Tycoon 2FA, one of the prominent phishing-as-a-service (PhaaS) toolkits that allowed cybercriminals to stage adversary-in-the-middle (AitM) credential harvesting attacks at scale, was dismantled by a ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: FBI and Europol Seize LeakBase Forum Used to Trade Stolen Credentials
item.description: A joint law enforcement operation has dismantled LeakBase, one of the world's largest online forums for cybercriminals to buy and sell stolen data and cybercrime tools. The LeakBase forum, per the U.S...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: VMware Aria Operations Bug Exploited, Cloud Resources at Risk
item.description: Exploitation of the command injection flaw in VMware Aria Operations could grant an attacker broad acess to victims' cloud environments....
